nodes.context: One-percenter motorcycle club formed in Asbury Park, New Jersey in 1965, involved in drug trafficking, racketeering, and violent conflicts.
Riverside, New Jersey-based motorcycle club patched over by the Breed in 1983.
Elizabeth, New Jersey-based motorcycle club patched over by the Breed in 1983.
Outlaw motorcycle club involved in violent conflict with the Breed, including a 1971 brawl in Cleveland and ongoing attacks.
Outlaw motorcycle club and rival of the Breed; both were prominent methamphetamine distributors in New Jersey.
Motorcycle club involved in conflicts with the Breed.
Outlaw motorcycle club that absorbed some Breed members after the club disbanded.

edges.context: The Breed patched over the Aces and Eights Motorcycle Club in 1983, absorbing them.
The Breed patched over the Branded Motorcycle Club in 1983, absorbing them.
The Breed engaged in a violent confrontation with the Hells Angels in Cleveland in 1971, resulting in deaths, and were continuously attacked by them over two decades.
The Breed had a rivalry with the Pagans, and both were prominent methamphetamine distributors in New Jersey.
The Breed was involved in conflicts with the Warlocks.
After the Breed disbanded, several members patched over to the Outlaws and established a chapter in Philadelphia.
